message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "laboratory coordinator" as lab_coord
participant ":LabCoordinatorUI" as UI
participant ":ValidateTestReportController" as Controller
participant ":Company" as Company
participant "rp : TestStore" as TestStore
participant "rp : Test" as Test
participant "rp : TestReportStore" as TestReportStore
participant "rp : TestReport" as TestReport
participant ":TestDiagnosis" as Diagnosis

lab_coord -> UI: 1 asks to validate report and diagnosis
activate UI
UI -> Controller: 2 createTestList()
activate Controller
Controller -> Company: 3 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate Company
Company -> TestStore: 4 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate TestStore
TestStore -> Test: 5 get = getTestList()
activate Test
deactivate Test
deactivate TestStore
Company -> TestReportStore: 6 get = testReportsToValidate()
activate TestReportStore
TestReportStore -> TestReport: 7 get = getTestReportList()
activate TestReport
TestReport -> Diagnosis: 8 get = getTestDiagnosis()
activate Diagnosis
deactivate Diagnosis
deactivate TestReport
deactivate TestReportStore
deactivate Company
ref right of Controller: US15_SD_testReportsDTO.puml
Controller --> UI: 9
deactivate Controller
deactivate UI
UI --> lab_coord: 10 shows the available test reports and diagnosis and requests selection
activate UI
lab_coord -> UI: 11 chooses all tests
activate UI
UI --> lab_coord: 12 asks for confirmation
lab_coord -> UI: 13 confirms selection
activate UI
UI -> Controller: 14 validateAllTestReport()
activate Controller
group loop
    Controller -> Test: 15 validateTestReport(testId);
    activate Test
    Test -> Test: 16 setState(VALIDATED);
    deactivate Test
    Controller -> Test: 17 registerValidationDate(date);
    activate Test
    Test -> Test: 18 setValidationDate(date);
    deactivate Test
end
deactivate Controller
deactivate UI
UI --> lab_coord: 19 informs operation success

@enduml
```
